steps.observed: Page loaded with comparison interface showing default fixture

steps.expected: Winner fixture loads with baseline and winner configs
steps.observed: Fixture loaded showing configs: 'baseline' and 'winner_rank1_score0.000'. Header shows RUN search_winner_rank1_score0.000_iter1

steps.action: Check Chart tab for detection markers from both configs
steps.expected: Chart shows detection markers from both baseline and winner
steps.observed: Chart shows teal markers for baseline and amber markers for winner_rank1_score0.000. Legend at top identifies both configs. Detection counts shown in left panel (e.g., Displacement: 160, Fvg: 71, Mss: 13, Order Block: 10, Liquidity Sweep: 7)

steps.action: Check Stats tab for improvement metrics
steps.expected: Stats show detection statistics for both configs side by side
steps.observed: Stats tab shows Detection Statistics with both configs: baseline (819 detections, 163.8 ± 5.7/day) and winner_rank1_score0.000 (819 detections, 163.8 ± 5.7/day). Session Distribution chart shows grouped bars for both configs.

steps.expected: Search provenance section shows iteration number, parameters changed
steps.observed: Search Provenance section displayed with: Winner Rank #1, Winner Iteration 1/3, Baseline Fitness 0.0000, Winner Fitness 0.0000, Improvement 0.0000. Parameter Overrides table shows 5 changed params: displacement.ltf.atr_multiplier=1.2500, displacement.ltf.body_ratio=0.5000, mss.ltf.confirmation_window_bars=3, swing_points.N.15m=2, swing_points.N.5m=3

steps.expected: File exists as Schema 4A comparison fixture
steps.observed: File exists at site/eval/search_winner.json (82MB). Schema v1.0, contains search_provenance section with winner_rank=1, winner_iteration=1, total_iterations=3, winner_config_overrides with 5 parameter changes

steps.action: Load winner fixture in compare.html via fixture dropdown
steps.expected: Fixture loads showing baseline vs winner comparison
steps.observed: Selected 'Search Winner' from fixture dropdown. Page loaded showing configs: baseline and winner_rank1_score0.000. Run ID: search_winner_rank1_score0.000_iter1

steps.action: Verify Stats tab shows improvement over baseline
steps.expected: Stats tab shows metrics for both configs with improvement indicators
steps.observed: Stats tab shows Detection Statistics for both configs side-by-side. Search Provenance section shows Improvement: 0.0000 (both baseline and winner fitness are 0.0000). This is a valid result — the search found no improvement, correctly displayed.

steps.action: Verify Chart tab shows detection differences
steps.expected: Chart shows markers from both configs, allowing visual comparison
steps.observed: Chart tab shows teal markers (baseline) and amber markers (winner_rank1_score0.000) overlaid on candlestick chart. Both configs have same detection counts since improvement is 0. Legend identifies both configs. DETECTIONS panel shows per-primitive counts for both.

frictions.description: The fixture dropdown ref @e1 resolved to 3 elements (ambiguous), requiring CSS selector '#fixture-select' instead of ref-based interaction
frictions.resolution: Used CSS selector agent-browser select '#fixture-select' 'Search Winner' instead of ref-based select

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-WIN-002: compare.html successfully loads the search_winner.json fixture via fixture dropdown, showing baseline vs winner_rank1_score0.000 with detection markers on Chart, stats comparison on Stats tab, and a Search Provenance section with winner rank, iteration, fitness, and parameter overrides. VAL-CROSS-003: Full cross-area flow verified — search_winner.json exists as Schema 4A fixture with search_provenance, loads in compare.html, Stats tab shows improvement metrics (0.0000 improvement), Chart tab shows detection markers from both configs. No console errors.
